title: masdevallia × mystica
intro: Masdevallia × mystica is a rare and exotic orchid hybrid, resulting from the cross between Masdevallia veitchiana and Masdevallia speciosa. This plant is known for its unique and delicate flowers, as well as its potential medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Masdevallia × mystica have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections.
